hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select prt_assignment_setup_id, assignment_id, prt_organisation_id, prt_document_id, prt_coh_scenario_id, prt_working_state, created_by, to_char(creation_date, '${dateFormat}') as creation_date, is_active from prt_assignment_setup where 1 = 1 ${auto_fill} ${where_clause} ${order_by_clause}
